name: Deputy Workforce Management API
what_it_does: Deputy REST API for workforce management, scheduling, and time-tracking platform. Enables AI agents to manage employee schedules, track time and attendance, process leave requests, handle shift swaps, calculate labor costs, and sync workforce data with payroll systems. Deputy specializes in hourly worker scheduling for hospitality, retail, healthcare, and service industries.
use_cases: Creating and managing employee schedules from workforce planning agents
Processing time and attendance data from payroll integration agents
Handling leave requests and shift swaps from HR automation agents
Analyzing labor costs and hours by department from operations intelligence agents
not_for: Salaried professional workforce without shift-based scheduling
Complex project-based time tracking without schedule management
HR information systems without scheduling and time-tracking requirements
best_when: A hospitality, retail, or service business wants AI agents to optimize staff scheduling, automate shift management, and sync time and attendance data with payroll systems.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Employee scheduling and attendance data is personnel data. Location-based clock-in captures geolocation data requiring appropriate disclosure.

auth.notes: Deputy uses OAuth 2.0 with authorization code flow for user-facing integrations, and a permanent API key option for server-side access. OAuth tokens are per-installation with scoped permissions.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan: up to 100 shifts/month; limited features
pricing.paid_tiers: Essential, Premium, and Enterprise plans per-employee per-month
pricing.notes: Australian company (Sydney HQ). Per-employee-per-month pricing. API access available on Premium and above.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per installation; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Employee scheduling and location data requires proper disclosure and consent
No public MCP server — REST API with OAuth2 or permanent API key
Australian company — AU data residency option; verify for US/EU compliance requirements
OAuth installation model: each Deputy account is a separate OAuth installation
Schedule conflicts and labor law compliance vary by jurisdiction — validate before publishing
API access requires Premium plan or above
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Employee scheduling, attendance, and location data. SOC2, GDPR. Australian company. OAuth2 with scopes. Geolocation data from clock-in.

security_score_components.security_notes: Employee scheduling and location data. SOC2, GDPR. Australian company. OAuth2. Geolocation requires disclosure.
